description_long: This is a modern, futuristic-style couch with a robust, boxy frame in a metallic gray finish, accented by control panels and circular motifs on the armrests. The seating area features two large, plush blue seat cushions and two matching blue backrest cushions, all appearing soft and inviting. Two purple accent pillows with light trim are placed asymmetrically on the seat, adding a pop of color and comfort. The armrests are wide and flat, integrated into the frame, and include embedded control panels with colored buttons and dials, suggesting a high-tech or sci-fi influence. The back and sides of the couch are solid and paneled, with subtle light blue highlights and geometric detailing. The overall design is both functional and decorative, making it suitable for urban public spaces or themed environments.
description: A futuristic gray couch with blue cushions, purple accent pillows, and integrated control panels on the armrests. The design is boxy, high-tech, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing two blue seat and back cushions, two purple accent pillows, and the control panels on both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the armrest, the control panel, and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, paneled back with light blue highlights and no visible cushions or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest with circular motifs, the arrangement of the accent pillows, and the side control panel.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large blue seat cushions and two matching blue backrest cushions, all loose and plush. Two purple accent pillows with light trim are placed on the seat, one on each side.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric upholstery on the cushions and solid purple fabric on the accent pillows, both with a smooth, unpatterned finish.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible; the couch appears to have a solid, continuous base integrated into the frame, giving it a blocky, grounded appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, flat, and rectangular armrests integrated into the frame, featuring embedded control panels and circular decorative motifs.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, loose blue backrest cushions placed against a solid, paneled back frame.
